name: Fernando Po Creole English

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Pichi (fern1234).

notes: Research tier, consulting Yakpo's grammar of Pichi. English-lexifier Atlantic creole of Bioko (Equatorial Guinea), an offshoot of Krio, written in a Latin phonemic orthography. Grapheme map covers the seven-vowel system (a e ɛ i o ɔ u), the labial-velar stops kp/gb, and the digraphs ch, sh, ny and ng. Pichi is a tone language; lexical and grammatical tone is not marked in the working orthography and is left unencoded, which sets the dominant PER floor for this entry.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Pichi (fern1234)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
sources.notes: Classification reference for a skeleton-tier entry.
